description: Dashboard for Jmeter using Backend listener and InfluxDB.

targets.query:
SELECT sum("count") AS "0-500 ms" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" <= 500
GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "500-1000 ms" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 500 AND "pct95.0" <= 1000
GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "1000-3000MS" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~/^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 1000 AND "pct95.0" <= 3000
GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "3000-5000 ms" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~/^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 3000 AND "pct95.0" <= 5000
GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "5000-10000 ms" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 5000 AND "pct95.0" <= 10000
GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "10000+ ms" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 10000
GROUP BY "transaction"

panels.title: Response Time Distribution in table - Pass (95th pct)

targets.query: SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" <= 500
SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 500 AND "pct95.0" <= 1000
SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 1000 AND "pct95.0" <= 3000
SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 3000 AND "pct95.0" <= 5000
SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 5000 AND "pct95.0" <= 10000
SELECT sum("count") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter AND "pct95.0" > 10000

SELECT "connectTime" 
FROM "requestsRaw" 
WHERE $timeFilter
LIMIT 10

SELECT count("responseTime") AS "fast_responses"
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ 
  AND "responseTime" <= 1000 
  AND $timeFilter

SELECT count("responseTime") AS "total_responses"
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ 
  AND $timeFilter

SELECT mean( "f1000") *100/$total
FROM
(SELECT count("responseTime") as "f1000" FROM "requestsRaw" WHERE  "requestName" !~ /^SCRIPT/ AND $timeFilter AND responseTime <=2000)
GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s)

SELECT mean( "f1000") *100/$total
FROM
(SELECT count("responseTime") as "f1000" FROM "requestsRaw" WHERE   "requestName" !~ /^SCRIPT/ AND $timeFilter AND responseTime <=3000)
GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s)

SELECT mean( "f1000") *100/$total
FROM
(SELECT count("responseTime") as "f1000" FROM "requestsRaw" WHERE   "requestName" !~ /^SCRIPT/ AND $timeFilter AND responseTime >= 5000)
GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s)
SHOW FIELD KEYS FROM "jmeter"
SHOW MEASUREMENTS
SHOW FIELD KEYS FROM "requestsRaw"

SELECT mean("latency")
FROM "autogen"."jmeter"
WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ 
  AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY time($aggregation)
fill(null)

SELECT mean("avg")
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/
AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok')
  AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY time($aggregation)
fill(null)

SELECT mean("pct95.0")
FROM "autogen"."jmeter
WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

SELECT mean("pct90.0")
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

SELECT mean("pct99.0")
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

SELECT max("avg")
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

SELECT count("count")
FROM "autogen"."jmeter"
WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation), "responseCode"
fill(null)

SELECT mean("avg")
FROM "autogen"."jmeter"
WHERE ("statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation), "transaction" fill(null)

SELECT percentile("responseTime", 90) / 1000
FROM "jmeter"
WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ 
  AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "requestName"

panels.title: Тестовые графики сюда пока не смотреть

targets.query: SELECT "text" FROM "autogen"."events" WHERE ("text" =~ /.* started/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "tags", "application"
SELECT "text" FROM "autogen"."events" WHERE ("text" =~ /.* ended/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "tags", "application"

panels.description: Активные потоки / Кол-во запросов в секунду

targets.query: SELECT mean("maxAT") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count")  / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("maxAT") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok'  AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

panels.title: Active Threads - Total Throughput (^HTTP.* - "ok")

targets.query: SELECT sum("countError") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") AS "totalReq" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "application"
SELECT sum("countError") AS "totalFail" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "application"
SELECT last("avg") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct90.0")  FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND  "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct95.0") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND  "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct99.0")  FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND  "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)
SELECT last("max") FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

panels.title: Error Info по HTTP*

targets.query: SELECT sum("count") AS "passReq" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT sum("count") AS "failReq" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT mean("pct95.0") AS "resTime95" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT mean("pct99.0") AS "resTime99" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT mean("count")  / 5 AS "rpsAvg" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT max("count")  / 5 AS "rpsMax" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^_UC.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "passReq" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ok' AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count") AS "failReq" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT mean("pct95.0") AS "resTime95" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT mean("pct99.0") AS "resTime99" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT mean("count")  / 5 AS "rpsAvg" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT max("count")  / 5 AS "rpsMax" FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("rb")  / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation), "transaction" fill(null)

SELECT sum("rb")  / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

SELECT sum("sb")  / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation), "transaction" fill(null)

SELECT sum("sb")  / 5 FROM "autogen"."jmeter" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'all' AND "transaction" =~ /^HTTP.*/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($aggregation) fill(null)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "application"
list.label: application
list.name: application
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "application"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "transaction" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all' AND $timeFilter
list.label: transaction
list.name: transaction
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "transaction" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all' AND $timeFilter

title: jmeter Дефолтные графики
